query:
WITH updated_row AS (
            UPDATE gambling_inventory
            SET quantity = quantity - $3
            WHERE user_id = $1
              AND item_id = $2
              AND $3 <= gambling_inventory.quantity
            RETURNING quantity
        ),
        deleted_row AS (
            DELETE FROM gambling_inventory
            WHERE user_id = $1 AND item_id = $2
            AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM updated_row ur WHERE ur.quantity <= 0)
            RETURNING item_id
        )
        SELECT
            ur.quantity
        FROM
            updated_row ur
